abstract.t: This document updates EAP-AKA’ (RFC 9048) by defining the use of the AT_FRAGMENT mechanism, as defined in I-D.ietf-emu-pqc-eapaka, for fragmentation of the AT_IDENTITY attribute. This update allows a peer to convey a large network access identifier, such as a Subscription Concealed Identifier (SUCI), during the EAP-AKA’ identity exchange when the encoded identity is too large to fit reliably in a single EAP packet. This is intended to support large SUCI values produced by post-quantum cryptographic concealment schemes, while preserving the existing EAP-AKA’ challenge and key derivation procedures.
